versions.version_description: Has a more detailed chord approach, such as mentioning the different bass chords.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]G#7/F#[/ch]
Take a bow, the night is over[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
This masquerade is getting older[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#/D#[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Lights are low, the curtains down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]G#/F#[/ch]
There's no one here[/tab]

(There's no one here, there's no one in the crowd)
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                 [ch]G#7/F#[/ch]
Say your lines but do you feel them[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]G#/D#[/ch]
Do you mean what you say when there's no one around (no one around)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#/B#[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch]
Watching you, watching me, one lonely star[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A#m7/D#[/ch]
(One lonely star you don't know who you are)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                                  [ch]G#[/ch]
I've always been in love with you (always with you)[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]
I guess you've always known it's true (you know it's true)[/tab]

You took my love for granted, why oh why
[tab][ch]D#7[/ch]                        [ch]G#[/ch]
The show is over, say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A#m7/D#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A#m7/D#[/ch]
Say goodbye (bye bye), say goodbye[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]G#7/F#[/ch]
Make them laugh, it comes so easy[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
When you get to the part[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#/D#[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Where you're breaking my heart (breaking my heart)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]G#7/F#[/ch]
Hide behind your smile, all the world loves a clown[/tab]

(Just make 'em smile, the whole world loves a clown)
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                 [ch]G#/F#[/ch]
Wish you well, I cannot stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]G#/D#[/ch]
You deserve an award for the role that you played (role that you played)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#/B#[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch]
No more masquerade, you're one lonely star[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A#m7/D#[/ch]
(One lonely star and you don't know who you are)[/tab]

(Chorus, repeat)

Say goodbye (bye bye), say goodbye

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                      [ch]G#[/ch]
All the world is a stage (world is a stage)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]                    [ch]G#[/ch]
And everyone has their part (has their part)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]G#/B#[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]
But how was I to know which way the story'd go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#/F#[/ch]
How was I to know you'd break[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D#7[/ch]
(You'd break, you'd break, you'd break)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]G#maj7[/ch]
You'd break my heart[/tab]

[tab]                              [ch]G#[/ch]
I've always been in love with you[/tab]

(I've always been in love with you)
[tab]                        [ch]A#m7[/ch]
Guess you've always known[/tab]

You took my love for granted, why oh why
[tab][ch]D#7[/ch]                        [ch]G#[/ch]
The show is over, say goodbye[/tab]

(Chorus)

Say goodbye (bye bye), say goodbye
Say goodbye
